products.name: Food Grade Lay Flat Pouch
products.shortDescription: High-quality lay flat pouch packaging designed specifically for the food industry
products.description: Our food-grade lay flat pouches are made from premium raw materials and comply with FDA food safety standards. Suitable for packaging coffee, nuts, dried fruits, tea, and various other food products. Customizable sizes, thicknesses, and printing patterns.
products.features: ["Food Grade Material","Moisture and Oxidation Resistant","Customizable Printing","Multiple Sizes Available","Eco-friendly and Recyclable"]

products.name: Industrial Heavy Duty Lay Flat Pouch
products.shortDescription: Durable lay flat pouch suitable for industrial products
products.description: Industrial heavy duty lay flat pouches are designed with thickened materials, offering excellent wear resistance and load-bearing capacity. Suitable for packaging chemical raw materials, hardware accessories, building materials, and other products.
products.features: ["High Load Capacity","Wear and Tear Resistant","Anti-static Optional","Moisture and Water Proof","Bulk Discounts Available"]

products.name: Stand Up Zipper Pouch
products.shortDescription: Self-standing design with zipper seal for easy storage
products.description: Stand up zipper pouches combine the display advantages of stand-up pouches with the convenience of zipper pouches. Products can stand independently on shelves, and consumers can easily open and reseal them, extending the shelf life of contents.
products.features: ["Self-standing Display","Resealable","Excellent Barrier Properties","Enhanced Brand Image","Eco-friendly Materials Available"]
products.specifications: [{"name":"Material","value":"PET/AL/PE, NY/AL/PE"},{"name":"Capacity","value":"50g-5kg"},{"name":"Zipper Type","value":"Easy-tear Zipper/Standard Zipper"},{"name":"Pouch Type","value":"Flat Bottom/Round Bottom"},{"name":"Certifications","value":"FDA, QS, ISO14001"}]

products.name: High Clarity Shrink Film
products.shortDescription: High clarity shrink film for perfect product display
products.description: High clarity shrink film uses premium POF/PVC materials with excellent shrinkage rate and transparency. Suitable for packaging food, beverages, daily necessities, and other products, providing outstanding product display effects and protection performance.
products.features: ["High Transparency","Fast Shrinkage","Strong and Durable","Eco-friendly and Non-toxic","Suitable for High-speed Packaging Machines"]

products.name: Vacuum Freshness Pouch
products.shortDescription: Professional vacuum packaging solution to extend product shelf life
products.description: Vacuum freshness pouches are designed for products requiring long-term storage, effectively blocking oxygen and moisture, extending product shelf life by 3-5 times. Suitable for vacuum packaging of meat, seafood, cheese, nuts, and other foods.
products.features: ["Excellent Oxygen Barrier","Superior Sealing","Puncture Resistant","Low Temperature Resistant","Customizable Printing"]
products.specifications: [{"name":"Material","value":"PA/PE, PET/AL/PA/PE"},{"name":"Thickness","value":"80-180 microns"},{"name":"Oxygen Barrier Rate","value":"<1 cc/m²/day"},{"name":"Temperature Resistance","value":"-40°C to 121°C"},{"name":"Certifications","value":"FDA, QS, HACCP"}]

products.name: Liquid Spouted Pouch
products.shortDescription: Spouted pouch design suitable for liquid product packaging
products.description: Liquid spouted pouches are innovative packaging solutions designed specifically for liquid products. Equipped with screw spouts or straw spouts for easy pouring and storage. Suitable for juices, beverages, seasonings, detergents, and other liquid products.
products.features: ["Self-standing Design","Leak-proof Spout Design","Easy to Pour","Reusable","Portable and Lightweight"]

siteContent.value: We are a professional plastic packaging solutions provider with 20 years of industry experience, providing high-quality packaging products to global customers. We are committed to innovation and sustainable development, providing the best packaging solutions for your products.
All products are ISO9001 quality certified, ensuring every product meets the highest standards
Providing comprehensive customization services from design to production to meet your personalized needs
Efficient production processes ensure on-time delivery, with support for urgent order processing
Using eco-friendly biodegradable materials to reduce environmental impact and practice sustainable development
Contact us for free samples and quotes, our professional team will provide you with the best solutions
No. 88, Packaging Industrial Park, Pudong New Area, Shanghai, China
© 2026 Plastic Packaging Technology Co., Ltd. All Rights Reserved
Providing professional packaging solutions for various industries

We have extensive industry experience and deeply understand the packaging needs of different industries. Whether it is food preservation, pharmaceutical safety, or industrial protection, we can provide you with the most suitable packaging solutions.
Contact us to get professional packaging solutions tailored to your industry
Flexible Packaging and Environmental Sustainable Development

As a member of the packaging industry, we deeply understand the importance of environmental protection. We are committed to developing and promoting eco-friendly packaging materials, reducing the environmental impact of packaging through technological innovation, and creating a sustainable future for customers and the planet.

We believe that quality packaging should not only protect products but also protect our planet. From material selection to production processes, we strive to be eco-friendly, energy-efficient, and sustainable in every step.
Choose Eco-friendly Packaging, Create a Better Future Together
Contact us to learn more about eco-friendly packaging solutions
Passed multiple international certifications including FDA and ISO
Custom packaging solutions tailored to industry characteristics
Respond to customer needs within 24 hours
Products exported to more than 50 countries worldwide

Jinshan over 10 years of experience in printing and packaging industry, specializing in flexible packaging, We provide multi-layer co-extruded films using BOPP, CPP, PET, and other materials for snacks, condiments, detergents, and drug packaging. Our goal is to enhance your design through appropriate packaging, thereby improving consumer perception of the product and increasing its value.

The company has advanced production equipment and testing instruments, and has passed multiple international certifications including ISO9001 quality management system certification and ISO14001 environmental management system certification. Our products comply with food safety standards such as FDA and QS.
We always adhere to the business philosophy of "Quality First, Customer First" and are committed to providing customers with the highest quality packaging products and the most satisfactory service.
Contact us for free samples and professional advice
We look forward to working with you

industries.name: Food Industry
industries.description: Providing fresh-keeping, moisture-proof, and oxidation-resistant packaging solutions for the food industry, compliant with FDA food safety standards. Suitable for coffee, nuts, snacks, seasonings, and various other food products.

industries.name: Beverage Industry
industries.description: Popular packaging solutions designed specifically for liquid products, including stand-up pouches and spouted pouches for juices, beverages, alcoholic beverages, and other products.

industries.name: Pharmaceutical Industry
industries.description: Pharmaceutical packaging solutions compliant with GMP standards, ensuring drug safety, moisture resistance, and anti-counterfeiting. Suitable for packaging tablets, capsules, powders, and other pharmaceutical products.

industries.name: Chemical Industry
industries.description: Corrosion-resistant, leak-proof chemical product packaging solutions, suitable for packaging chemical raw materials, detergents, coatings, and other products.

industries.name: Agriculture Industry
industries.description: Providing professional packaging for seeds, fertilizers, pesticides, and other agricultural products, with excellent moisture resistance and durability.

industries.name: Pet Food Industry
industries.description: Professional pet food packaging solutions that maintain food freshness, featuring functional designs such as zippers and degassing valves.
